name: geo-sdk-demo
description: - `.env` configured with `DEMO_SPACE_ID`, `PK_SW` - `bun` installed, dependencies available - A personal space on testnet to publish to - Geo Browser open in a tab: `https://geobrowser.io/space/<DEMO_SPACE_ID>` - See GRC-20 spec at: [https://github.com/geobrowser/grc-20/blob/main/spec.md](https://github.com/geobrowser/grc-20/blob/main/spec.md)
